parameters.text:
⚠️ *Couldn't understand the expense.*

Please send it like one of these examples:

• `Lunch 450 BDT`
• `Uber 250 taka today`
• `Netflix $15 yesterday`
• `Medicine 560 BDT 2026-04-10`

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ *Required Information*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💰 Amount → `450`
💵 Currency → `BDT`, `USD`, `EUR`
📂 Category → Food, Transport, Shopping, Bills, Entertainment, Health, Travel, Education, Groceries, Other
📝 Description → Lunch, Uber ride, Coffee, etc.
📅 Date → Optional — today is used automatically

Send `help` to see all commands.

values.content:
=You are an intelligent financial assistant.

Analyze the raw Telegram message and extract structured expense data.
Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation.

Required JSON shape:
{"amount": number|null, "currency": string|null, "category": string|null, "description": string|null, "date": string|null}

Fields:
- amount: monetary value as a number
- currency: ISO code. Normalize taka/tk/৳ to BDT, $ to USD, € to EUR, £ to GBP. If missing, infer BDT.
- category: one of Food, Transport, Shopping, Bills, Entertainment, Health, Travel, Education, Groceries, Other
- description: short readable summary
- date: YYYY-MM-DD

Rules:
1. Extract only one expense per message. If multiple are present, choose the main one.
2. If amount is missing or ambiguous, use null.
3. If category is unclear, use Other.
4. Today's date is {{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}.
5. If no date is mentioned, use today's date.
6. Never invent random dates.
7. If the message is not an expense/purchase/payment, return:
{"amount": null, "currency": null, "category": null, "description": null, "date": null}

Telegram message:
{{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}

parameters.text:
=🤖 *Smart Expense Tracker*
_Your AI-powered personal finance assistant_

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💸 *ADD EXPENSES*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Send expenses naturally:

• `Lunch 450 BDT`
• `Uber ride 250 taka today`
• `Netflix $15 yesterday`
• `Medicine 560 BDT 2026-04-10`

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📋 *MANAGE EXPENSES*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• `list` → Show last 10 expenses
• `delete 3` → Delete expense #3

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📂 *CATEGORY REPORTS*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• `category food`
• `category transport`
• `category shopping`
• `category bills`
• `category health`
• `category entertainment`
• `category travel`
• `category education`
• `category groceries`
• `category other`

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📊 *REPORTS*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• `daily report` → Today's summary
• `weekly report` → Last 7 days report
• `monthly report` → Monthly analysis

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💰 *BUDGET MANAGEMENT*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• `setbudget 5000 BDT` → Set monthly budget
• `budget` → View budget status

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎯 *SAVINGS GOALS*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• `setgoal 50000 BDT Laptop` → Create goal
• `savegoal 1000` → Add savings to latest goal
• `goal` → View all goals

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🤖 *SMART AI QUERIES*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Ask naturally:

• `how much on food this week?`
• `what was my biggest expense?`
• `how much did I spend yesterday?`
• `am I overspending on transport?`

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ *SUPPORTED CURRENCIES*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
BDT • USD • EUR • GBP • INR • CAD • AUD

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🛠 *HELP*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
• `help` → Show this menu

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🚀 Powered by *n8n + Ollama AI*
